honesty: This closes the first structural scan gap if max_tau < tau_min and tau=sigma throughout. It does not prove Terras globally or Collatz.
statement: Every odd integer n with 10^9 < n <= n_ceiling has tau(n) < tau_min; hence no Terras violation can occur in convergent band [31867, 79335) beyond the 10^9 scan — the band is proved empty.
